abilities.name: Wait Then Fire
abilities.description: If none of the 10th Regiment of Foot move this turn, add 1 die to their attack.

abilities.name: Melee Defense 1
abilities.description: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent figure, a Soldier in the 10th Regiment of Foot adds 1 to his defense dice.

abilities.name: Bayonet Attack 1
abilities.description: When rolling attack dice against an adjacent figure, a Soldier in the 10th Regiment of Foot adds 1 to his attack dice. A Soldier in the 10th Regiment of Foot can only use Bayonet Attack if he moved at least one space this turn.

abilities.name: Wait Then FIre
abilities.description: If none of the 4th Massachusetts Line move this turn, add 1 die to their attack.

abilities.name: Valiant Army Defense Bonus
abilities.description: If every Army Card you control has a valiant personality, each soldier in the 4th Massachusetts Line receives 1 additional defense die.

abilities.name: Super Leap
abilities.description: Instead of his normal move, Abomination may Super Leap. Super Leap has a move of 10. When counting spaces for Abomination's Super Leap movement, ignore elevations. Abomination may leap over water without stopping, leap over figures without becoming engaged, and leap over obstacles such as ruins. Abomination may not leap more than 50 levels up or down in a single leap. If Abomination is engaged when he starts to leap, he will take any leaving engagement attacks. Abomination rolls 3 less attack dice on any turn that he chooses to Super Leap.

abilities.name: Stomp Special Attack
abilities.description:
Range 1. Attack 3.
Any figure adjacent to Abomination is affected by the Stomp Special Attack. Roll 3 attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense separately. Abomination cannot attack using his Stomp Special Attack on the same turn he uses Super Leap.

abilities.name: Leaf of the Home Tree Aura
abilities.description: When any Elf you control within 8 clear sight spaces of Acolarh receives enough wounds to be destroyed, you may roll 10 Ullar Valkyrie dice before removing the figure. If you roll at least 3 Ullar symbols, ignore any wounds that figure just received. Acolarh’s Leaf of the Home Tree Aura does not affect Acolarh.

abilities.name: Ullar's Amulet
abilities.description: All friendly figures who follow Ullar and start their turn adjacent to Acolarh may move 2 additional spaces.

abilities.name: Ghost Walk
abilities.description: Agent Carr can move through all figures.

abilities.name: Sword of Reckoning 4
abilities.description: If Agent Carr is attacking an adjacent figure, add 4 dice to Agent Carr’s attack.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.description: Agent Carr is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

abilities.name: Double Attack
abilities.description: When Agent Skahen attacks, she may attack one additional time.

abilities.name: Cover Fire
abilities.description: When attacking an opponent’s figure, if Agent Skahen inflicts one or more wounds, you may move one Tricky figure you control who follows Vydar and is within 8 clear sight spaces of Agent Skahen up to 4 spaces. You cannot use Cover Fire to move Agent Skahen.

abilities.name: Stealth Dodge
abilities.description: When Agent Skahen rolls defense dice against an attacking figure who is not adjacent, one shield will block all damage.
